# Lexakind

> Lexakind is a legal-services platform connecting individuals and businesses
> across India with verified, specialist advocates. Headquartered in Bengaluru,
> Karnataka, we cover 190+ legal services across 13 practice areas with
> transparent pricing, end-to-end case tracking, and a free first consultation.

Contact: +91 86188 88526 · lexakind1@gmail.com
Location: Level 15, UB City, Concorde Towers, Vittal Mallya Road, Bengaluru 560001
Hours: Mon–Fri 8AM–5PM · Sat 8AM–1PM

## Practice areas
- [Corporate Law](https://www.lexakind.com/practice-areas/corporate-law): Business formation, agreements & compliance
- [Family Law](https://www.lexakind.com/practice-areas/family-law): Matrimonial, divorce, custody & family matters
- [Criminal Law](https://www.lexakind.com/practice-areas/criminal-law): Defence, bail & criminal case representation
- [Civil Litigation](https://www.lexakind.com/practice-areas/civil-litigation): Court cases, disputes & civil remedies
- [Property Law](https://www.lexakind.com/practice-areas/property-law): Property verification, disputes & documentation
- [Real Estate & RERA](https://www.lexakind.com/practice-areas/real-estate-rera): RERA complaints, builder disputes & NRI property
- [Cyber Crime](https://www.lexakind.com/practice-areas/cyber-crime): Online fraud, data theft & digital harassment
- [Consumer Protection](https://www.lexakind.com/practice-areas/consumer-protection): Consumer complaints, fraud & online scams
- [Intellectual Property](https://www.lexakind.com/practice-areas/intellectual-property): Trademarks, patents, copyright & design
- [NRI Legal Services](https://www.lexakind.com/practice-areas/nri-legal-services): Property, court cases & legal aid for NRIs
- [Labour & Employment](https://www.lexakind.com/practice-areas/labour-employment): Workplace rights, compliance & employment law
- [Foreign Nationals](https://www.lexakind.com/practice-areas/foreign-nationals): Visa, immigration & legal aid for foreigners in India
- [Consultation Services](https://www.lexakind.com/practice-areas/consultation): Direct legal advice across all areas

## Key pages
- [All practice areas](https://www.lexakind.com/practice-areas): Browse 190+ services across 13 practice areas
- [Book a consultation](https://www.lexakind.com/consultation): Free first consultation with a verified advocate
- [About Lexakind](https://www.lexakind.com/about): Mission, values and approach
- [Our team](https://www.lexakind.com/about/team): The verified advocates behind Lexakind
- [Contact](https://www.lexakind.com/contact): Phone, email, office and enquiry form

## Resources
- [Legal Insights blog](https://www.lexakind.com/resources/blog): Plain-language legal guidance on property, family, corporate, recovery and real estate

## Notes
- Lexakind serves clients across all of India, with a head office in Bengaluru.
- Information on the website is general and does not constitute legal advice.
